articles.title: NVIDIA LAUNCHES GPT-4 QUALITY MODEL
articles.summary: NVIDIA's Nemotron-4 340B is a family of open models that developers can use to generate synthetic data for training LLMs for commercial applications. The state-of-the-art reward model matches the original GPT-4 model and can run on 8 H100s.

articles.title: APPLE TO ‘PAY' OPENAI FOR CHATGPT THROUGH DISTRIBUTION, NOT CASH
articles.summary: Apple and OpenAI's partnership isn't expected to generate meaningful revenue for either party, at least at the beginning. Apple believes that pushing OpenAI's brand and technology to its devices is of equal or greater value than monetary payments so it isn't paying OpenAI as part of the deal. The deal isn't exclusive - Apple is already discussing offering other chatbots as additional options. Apple eventually plans to make money from AI by striking revenue-sharing agreements with AI partners.

articles.title: AI WILL MAKE MONEY SOONER THAN YOU'D THINK
articles.summary: This article contains a transcript of an interview with Aidan Gomez, CEO of Cohere, where he discusses Cohere's path to profitability, the benefit of competition in the enterprise space, AI's current abilities, the future of large language models, and more.

articles.title: MASKED DIFFUSION LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: Simple diffusion model for language modeling. It generates out of order and works quite well.

articles.title: JAILBREAK ATTACKS ON LARGE LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: Researchers are addressing the vulnerability of Large Language Models to jailbreak attacks, which manipulate models to produce harmful outputs.

articles.title: EFFICIENT TRANSFORMER WITH KEY-VALUE SHARING
articles.summary: Multi-Layer Key-Value (MLKV) sharing is a new method that significantly reduces memory usage during auto-regressive inference in transformers.

articles.title: LLAMA 3 8B MATCHES GPT 4 MATH PERFORMANCE WITH MCTS
articles.summary: The current Holy Grail of research is figuring out how to integrate search into language model generation. This work is extremely promising and shows that small models with search can match much more powerful models on math performance.

articles.title: VIDEO UNDERSTANDING WITH VIDEOGPT+
articles.summary: VideoGPT+ is a model that combines image and video encoders to enhance video understanding. Image encoders capture detailed spatial information, while video encoders provide temporal context.

articles.title: SCENE GRAPH GENERATION IN SATELLITE IMAGERY
articles.summary: This project introduces a new dataset and framework to improve Scene Graph Generation (SGG) for very-high-resolution satellite imagery (VHR SAI).

articles.title: FAKE BEAUTY QUEENS CHARM JUDGES AT THE MISS AI PAGEANT
articles.summary: Aiyana Rainbow, a Romanian AI model, is a finalist in the inaugural Miss AI pageant, an event that features AI-generated models on social media. Organized by FanVue, the event is part of "The FanVue World AI Creator Awards," which showcases AI creators' ability to generate engaging content without being the physical face themselves. The winner of Miss AI is set to receive $5,000, public relations support, and mentorship. The results will be announced at the end of June.

articles.title: NVIDIA'S NEW SALES BOOSTER: THE GLOBAL PUSH FOR NATIONAL AI CHAMPIONS
articles.summary: Governments around the world are boosting their budgets to encourage companies and multinationals to build new data centers and refit old ones to develop AI locally and train large language models in their native languages based on their own citizens' data. Nvidia says that these sovereign AI efforts are expected to bring in almost $10 billion this year. Many governments are concerned about how generative AI will impact their economies. They want sovereign clouds for their AI infrastructure and sensitive data, and US tech companies are eager to build those for them.

articles.title: ELON MUSK RECONSIDERS PHONE PROJECT AFTER APPLE INTELLIGENCE OPENAI INTEGRATION
articles.summary: Elon Musk responded to Apple's integration of OpenAI ChatGPT on some of its devices by threatening to ban all Apple devices from the premises of his companies.

articles.title: MICROSOFT AI CEO PEERS INTO OPENAI'S CODE, HIGHLIGHTING AN UNUSUAL RIVALRY
articles.summary: OpenAI, initially created to counter DeepMind's AI advancements, is now closely partnered with Microsoft, which has rights to OpenAI's technology due to significant investments.

articles.title: LLM.MOJO
articles.summary: A port of Andrej Karpathy's llm.c to Mojo.

articles.title: AMAZON SAYS IT'LL SPEND $230M ON GENERATIVE AI STARTUPS
articles.summary: Amazon says that it will commit up to $230 million to startups building generative AI-powered applications.
